title: Simple Security
description: Simple craftable blocks that do damage or other effects when walked over.
body:
# --THIS MOD WAS MADE USING MCREATOR--

Simple Security contains blocks that require iron and other materials relating to their purposes. They do certain effects when walked over, with some setting things ablaze, others simply just damaging, others slowing mobs down. 

I originally made this mod utilising MCreator since I didn't want to spend a hour or two coding something i'd use probably once or twice. 

Currently, there are 4 block trees and 3 tiers. **Slowing (slime)**, **Igniting (fire)**, **Damaging (simple)** and **Exploding (boom)**.
